'''banumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamiter|dynamiter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamiter|dynamiter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| banumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bænimith|bænimith]] || [[word:bænimij|bænimij]] || [[word:bænimish|bænimish]] || [[word:bænimi|bænimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:banunumuth|banunumuth]] || [[word:banunumuj|banunumuj]] || [[word:banunumush|banunumush]] || [[word:banunumu|banunumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:banumuth|banumuth]] || [[word:banumuj|banumuj]] || [[word:banumush|banumush]] || [[word:banumu|banumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:banufmuth|banufmuth]] || [[word:banufmuj|banufmuj]] || [[word:banufmush|banufmush]] || [[word:banufmuf|banufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banumuthu|banumuthu]] || [[word:banumuju|banumuju]] || [[word:banumushu|banumushu]] || [[word:banumuku|banumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banumuth|banumuth]] || [[word:banumuj|banumuj]] || [[word:banumush|banumush]] || [[word:banumu|banumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banumuthul|banumuthul]] || [[word:banumujul|banumujul]] || [[word:banumushul|banumushul]] || [[word:banumukul|banumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banumuthuthu|banumuthuthu]] || [[word:banumujuju|banumujuju]] || [[word:banumushushu|banumushushu]] || [[word:banumuku|banumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banumuthun|banumuthun]] || [[word:banumujun|banumujun]] || [[word:banumushun|banumushun]] || [[word:banumukun|banumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banumuthuoro|banumuthuoro]] || [[word:banumujuoro|banumujuoro]] || [[word:banumushuoro|banumushuoro]] || [[word:banumukuoro|banumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
